In addition, MCTS is equipped with a pre-trained neural network (NN) that guides the selection phase. This procedure incorporates the predictive capabilities of NNs for a more informed tree search process under computational constraints. In our experimental evaluation, we consider metrics that address both safety (through collision rates) and efficacy (through measured speed). Then, we examine: (a) the influence of isotropic state information for vehicles in a lane-free environment, resulting in nudging behaviour--vehicles' policy reacts due to the presence of faster tailing ones, (b) the acceleration of performance for the NN-guided variant of MCTS, and (c) the trade-off between computational resources and solution quality.
tldr: This paper explores using neural network guided Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) for autonomous driving in lane-free environments, focusing on safety and efficiency metrics. It investigates how state information influences vehicle behavior and the performance acceleration achieved with NN guidance.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用神经网络引导的蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）在无车道环境中进行自动驾驶，重点关注安全性和效率指标。它研究了状态信息如何影响车辆行为以及通过神经网络引导实现的性能加速。
summary_zh: 无车道交通环境允许车辆更好地利用道路的横向空间，而无需局限于车道保持，从而提高了交通流量。因此，我们面临着一个独特且更具挑战性的自动驾驶环境。在这项工作中，我们考虑使用蒙特卡罗树搜索(MCTS)规划方法，用于无车道交通中的单智能体自动驾驶，其中我们构建的相关马尔可夫决策过程(MDP)受到与强化学习框架相关的现有方法的影响。此外，MCTS配备了一个预训练的神经网络(NN)，用于引导选择阶段。该程序结合了神经网络的预测能力，以便在计算约束下进行更明智的树搜索过程。在我们的实验评估中，我们考虑了涉及安全（通过碰撞率）和效率（通过测量速度）的指标。然后，我们研究了：(a) 无车道环境中车辆各向同性状态信息的影响，导致推撞行为——车辆策略因速度更快的尾随车辆的存在而做出反应，(b) 神经网络引导的MCTS变体的性能加速，以及(c) 计算资源与解决方案质量之间的权衡。

title: RIFT: Repurposing Negative Samples via Reward-Informed Fine-Tuning
summary: While Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Rejection Sampling Fine-Tuning (RFT) are standard for LLM alignment, they either rely on costly expert data or discard valuable negative samples, leading to data inefficiency. To address this, we propose Reward Informed Fine-Tuning (RIFT), a simple yet effective framework that utilizes all self-generated samples. Unlike the hard thresholding of RFT, RIFT repurposes negative trajectories, reweighting the loss with scalar rewards to learn from both the positive and negative trajectories from the model outputs. To overcome the training collapse caused by naive reward integration, where direct multiplication yields an unbounded loss, we introduce a stabilized loss formulation that ensures numerical robustness and optimization efficiency. Extensive experiments on mathematical benchmarks across various base models show that RIFT consistently outperforms RFT. Our results demonstrate that RIFT is a robust and data-efficient alternative for alignment using mixed-quality, self-generated data.
tldr: RIFT introduces a reward-informed fine-tuning method that repurposes negative samples in LLM alignment, improving data efficiency compared to SFT and RFT by using a stabilized loss formulation.
tldr_zh: RIFT 提出了一种奖励引导的微调方法，通过使用稳定的损失函数来重新利用 LLM 对齐中的负样本，从而提高了数据效率，优于 SFT 和 RFT。
summary_zh: 监督式微调（SFT）和拒绝采样微调（RFT）是大型语言模型对齐的标准方法，但它们要么依赖于成本高昂的专家数据，要么丢弃有价值的负样本，导致数据效率低下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出奖赏引导微调（RIFT），这是一种简单而有效的框架，可以利用所有自生成样本。与RFT的硬阈值处理不同，RIFT重新利用负轨迹，通过标量奖赏重新加权损失，从而从模型输出的正负轨迹中学习。为了克服由朴素奖赏集成引起的训练崩溃（直接乘法会产生无界损失），我们引入了稳定的损失函数形式，确保了数值鲁棒性和优化效率。在各种基础模型上的数学基准测试中进行的大量实验表明，RIFT始终优于RFT。我们的结果表明，RIFT是一种稳健且数据高效的替代方案，可用于使用混合质量的自生成数据进行对齐。

title: Hybrid guided variational autoencoder for visual place recognition
summary: Autonomous agents such as cars, robots and drones need to precisely localize themselves in diverse environments, including in GPS-denied indoor environments. One approach for precise localization is visual place recognition (VPR), which estimates the place of an image based on previously seen places. State-of-the-art VPR models require high amounts of memory, making them unwieldy for mobile deployment, while more compact models lack robustness and generalization capabilities. This work overcomes these limitations for robotics using a combination of event-based vision sensors and an event-based novel guided variational autoencoder (VAE). The encoder part of our model is based on a spiking neural network model which is compatible with power-efficient low latency neuromorphic hardware. The VAE successfully disentangles the visual features of 16 distinct places in our new indoor VPR dataset with a classification performance comparable to other state-of-the-art approaches while, showing robust performance also under various illumination conditions. When tested with novel visual inputs from unknown scenes, our model can distinguish between these places, which demonstrates a high generalization capability by learning the essential features of location. Our compact and robust guided VAE with generalization capabilities poses a promising model for visual place recognition that can significantly enhance mobile robot navigation in known and unknown indoor environments.
tldr: This paper presents a novel, compact, and robust guided VAE for visual place recognition using event-based vision and spiking neural networks, offering improved navigation for mobile robots in indoor environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖、紧凑且鲁棒的引导变分自编码器（VAE），用于视觉位置识别，该方法使用基于事件的视觉和脉冲神经网络，从而提高移动机器人在室内环境中的导航能力。
summary_zh: 诸如汽车、机器人和无人机之类的自主体需要在各种环境中精确定位自身，包括在无GPS的室内环境中。一种精确定位的方法是视觉地点识别(VPR)，它基于先前见过的地点估计图像的位置。目前最先进的VPR模型需要大量的内存，使得它们在移动部署方面显得笨拙，而更紧凑的模型则缺乏鲁棒性和泛化能力。这项工作通过结合基于事件的视觉传感器和一个基于事件的新型引导式变分自动编码器(VAE)克服了机器人技术的这些局限性。我们模型的编码器部分基于脉冲神经网络模型，该模型与节能的低延迟神经形态硬件兼容。VAE成功地解耦了我们新的室内VPR数据集中16个不同地点的视觉特征，其分类性能与其他最先进的方法相当，同时在各种光照条件下也表现出强大的性能。当使用来自未知场景的新视觉输入进行测试时，我们的模型可以区分这些地点，这表明通过学习位置的基本特征具有很高的泛化能力。我们紧凑且鲁棒的具有泛化能力的引导式VAE为视觉地点识别提供了一个有前景的模型，可以显著增强移动机器人在已知和未知室内环境中的导航能力。

title: SSVP: Synergistic Semantic-Visual Prompting for Industrial Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection
summary: Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection (ZSAD) leverages Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to enable supervision-free industrial inspection. However, existing ZSAD paradigms are constrained by single visual backbones, which struggle to balance global semantic generalization with fine-grained structural discriminability. To bridge this gap, we propose Synergistic Semantic-Visual Prompting (SSVP), that efficiently fuses diverse visual encodings to elevate model's fine-grained perception. Specifically, SSVP introduces the Hierarchical Semantic-Visual Synergy (HSVS) mechanism, which deeply integrates DINOv3's multi-scale structural priors into the CLIP semantic space. Subsequently, the Vision-Conditioned Prompt Generator (VCPG) employs cross-modal attention to guide dynamic prompt generation, enabling linguistic queries to precisely anchor to specific anomaly patterns. Furthermore, to address the discrepancy between global scoring and local evidence, the Visual-Text Anomaly Mapper (VTAM) establishes a dual-gated calibration paradigm. Extensive evaluations on seven industrial benchmarks validate the robustness of our method; SSVP achieves state-of-the-art performance with 93.0\% Image-AUROC and 92.2\% Pixel-AUROC on MVTec-AD, significantly outperforming existing zero-shot approaches.
tldr: This paper introduces SSVP, a novel zero-shot anomaly detection method that fuses diverse visual encodings and uses synergistic semantic-visual prompting to achieve state-of-the-art performance on industrial anomaly detection benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SSVP，一种新颖的零样本异常检测方法，它融合了多种视觉编码，并使用协同语义-视觉提示在工业异常检测基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 零样本异常检测（ZSAD）利用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）实现无监督的工业检测。然而，现有的ZSAD范式受限于单一视觉骨干网络，难以平衡全局语义泛化能力和细粒度结构可区分性。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了协同语义-视觉提示（SSVP），它能有效地融合多种视觉编码，以提升模型细粒度的感知能力。具体而言，SSVP引入了分层语义-视觉协同（HSVS）机制，将DINOv3的多尺度结构先验深度集成到CLIP语义空间中。随后，视觉条件提示生成器（VCPG）采用跨模态注意力来指导动态提示生成，使语言查询能够精确地锚定到特定的异常模式。此外，为了解决全局评分和局部证据之间的差异，视觉-文本异常映射器（VTAM）建立了一个双门控校准范式。在七个工业基准测试上的大量评估验证了我们方法的鲁棒性；SSVP达到了最先进的性能，在MVTec-AD上实现了93.0%的图像-AUROC和92.2%的像素-AUROC，显著优于现有的零样本方法。

title: DScheLLM: Enabling Dynamic Scheduling through a Fine-Tuned Dual-System Large language Model
summary: Production scheduling is highly susceptible to dynamic disruptions, such as variations in processing times, machine availability, and unexpected task insertions. Conventional approaches typically rely on event-specific models and explicit analytical formulations, which limits their adaptability and generalization across previously unseen disturbances. To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes DScheLLM, a dynamic scheduling approach that leverages fine-tuned large language models within a dual-system (fast-slow) reasoning architecture to address disturbances of different scales. A unified large language model-based framework is constructed to handle dynamic events, where training datasets for both fast and slow reasoning modes are generated using exact schedules obtained from an operations research solver. The Huawei OpenPangu Embedded-7B model is subsequently fine-tuned under the hybrid reasoning paradigms using LoRA. Experimental evaluations on standard job shop scheduling benchmarks demonstrate that the fast-thinking mode can efficiently generate high-quality schedules and the slow-thinking mode can produce solver-compatible and well-formatted decision inputs. To the best of our knowledge, this work represents one of the earliest studies applying large language models to job shop scheduling in dynamic environments, highlighting their considerable potential for intelligent and adaptive scheduling optimization.
tldr: The paper introduces DScheLLM, a fine-tuned LLM-based dual-system approach (fast/slow reasoning) for dynamic job shop scheduling, addressing limitations of traditional optimization methods against production disruptions by generating high-quality schedules and solver-compatible decision inputs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DScheLLM，一种基于微调LLM的双系统方法（快速/慢速推理），用于动态作业车间调度。它通过生成高质量的调度方案和与求解器兼容的决策输入，解决了传统优化方法在应对生产中断方面的局限性。
summary_zh: 生产调度极易受到动态扰动的影响，例如加工时间的变化、机器可用性的变化以及意外的任务插入。传统方法通常依赖于特定事件的模型和显式分析公式，这限制了它们在先前未见过的扰动中的适应性和泛化能力。为了克服这些限制，本文提出了一种动态调度方法DScheLLM，该方法利用在双系统（快-慢）推理架构中微调的大型语言模型来处理不同规模的扰动。构建了一个统一的基于大型语言模型的框架来处理动态事件，其中快、慢推理模式的训练数据集均使用从运筹学求解器获得的精确调度生成。随后，使用LoRA在混合推理范式下微调华为盘古嵌入式-7B模型。在标准作业车间调度基准上的实验评估表明，快思模式可以高效地生成高质量的调度，而慢思模式可以产生与求解器兼容且格式良好的决策输入。据我们所知，这项工作是最早将大型语言模型应用于动态环境中的作业车间调度的研究之一，突显了它们在智能和自适应调度优化方面的巨大潜力。

title: PhyRPR: Training-Free Physics-Constrained Video Generation
summary: Recent diffusion-based video generation models can synthesize visually plausible videos, yet they often struggle to satisfy physical constraints. A key reason is that most existing approaches remain single-stage: they entangle high-level physical understanding with low-level visual synthesis, making it hard to generate content that require explicit physical reasoning. To address this limitation, we propose a training-free three-stage pipeline,\textit{PhyRPR}:\textit{Phy\uline{R}eason}--\textit{Phy\uline{P}lan}--\textit{Phy\uline{R}efine}, which decouples physical understanding from visual synthesis. Specifically, \textit{PhyReason} uses a large multimodal model for physical state reasoning and an image generator for keyframe synthesis; \textit{PhyPlan} deterministically synthesizes a controllable coarse motion scaffold; and \textit{PhyRefine} injects this scaffold into diffusion sampling via a latent fusion strategy to refine appearance while preserving the planned dynamics. This staged design enables explicit physical control during generation. Extensive experiments under physics constraints show that our method consistently improves physical plausibility and motion controllability.
tldr: The paper introduces PhyRPR, a training-free, three-stage video generation pipeline designed to improve physical plausibility and motion controllability by decoupling physical understanding from visual synthesis.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为PhyRPR的无需训练的三阶段视频生成流程，旨在通过解耦物理理解和视觉合成来提高物理合理性和运动可控性。
summary_zh: 近期基于扩散的视频生成模型能够合成视觉上合理的视频，但它们往往难以满足物理约束。一个关键原因是，大多数现有方法仍处于单阶段：它们将高层次的物理理解与低层次的视觉合成相纠缠，使得生成需要显式物理推理的内容变得困难。为了解决这个局限性，我们提出了一个无需训练的三阶段流程，\textit{PhyRPR}:\textit{Phy\uline{R}eason}--\textit{Phy\uline{P}lan}--\textit{Phy\uline{R}efine}，它将物理理解与视觉合成解耦。具体而言，\textit{PhyReason} 使用大型多模态模型进行物理状态推理，并使用图像生成器进行关键帧合成；\textit{PhyPlan} 确定性地合成一个可控的粗糙运动骨架；而 \textit{PhyRefine} 通过一种潜在融合策略将此骨架注入到扩散采样中，以细化外观，同时保留计划的动态。这种分阶段的设计使得在生成过程中能够进行显式的物理控制。在物理约束下进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法始终能够提高物理合理性和运动可控性。

title: Affostruction: 3D Affordance Grounding with Generative Reconstruction
summary: This paper addresses the problem of affordance grounding from RGBD images of an object, which aims to localize surface regions corresponding to a text query that describes an action on the object. While existing methods predict affordance regions only on visible surfaces, we propose Affostruction, a generative framework that reconstructs complete geometry from partial observations and grounds affordances on the full shape including unobserved regions. We make three core contributions: generative multi-view reconstruction via sparse voxel fusion that extrapolates unseen geometry while maintaining constant token complexity, flow-based affordance grounding that captures inherent ambiguity in affordance distributions, and affordance-driven active view selection that leverages predicted affordances for intelligent viewpoint sampling. Affostruction achieves 19.1 aIoU on affordance grounding (40.4\% improvement) and 32.67 IoU for 3D reconstruction (67.7\% improvement), enabling accurate affordance prediction on complete shapes.
tldr: The paper introduces Affostruction, a novel generative framework for 3D affordance grounding from RGBD images, which leverages generative reconstruction and flow-based grounding to predict affordances on complete object shapes, even in unobserved regions. It uses active view selection to further improve the prediction performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Affostruction的新型生成框架，用于从RGBD图像中进行3D可供性（Affordance）的定位，它利用生成重构和基于流的可供性定位来预测完整对象形状上的可供性，即使在未观察到的区域也是如此。它使用主动视图选择来进一步提高预测性能。
summary_zh: 本文研究了从物体的RGBD图像中进行可供性推断的问题，旨在定位对应于描述物体上某个动作的文本查询的表面区域。现有方法仅在可见表面上预测可供性区域，而我们提出了Affostruction，一个生成式框架，可以从局部观测中重建完整的几何形状，并在包括未观测区域在内的完整形状上推断可供性。我们做出了三个核心贡献：通过稀疏体素融合进行生成式多视图重建，在保持恒定令牌复杂度的同时外推未见几何形状；基于流的可供性推断，捕捉可供性分布中固有的模糊性；以及可供性驱动的主动视角选择，利用预测的可供性进行智能视点采样。Affostruction在可供性推断上实现了19.1%的aIoU（提升40.4%），在3D重建上实现了32.67%的IoU（提升67.7%），从而能够对完整形状进行精确的可供性预测。

title: 3AM: Segment Anything with Geometric Consistency in Videos
summary: Video object segmentation methods like SAM2 achieve strong performance through memory-based architectures but struggle under large viewpoint changes due to reliance on appearance features. Traditional 3D instance segmentation methods address viewpoint consistency but require camera poses, depth maps, and expensive preprocessing. We introduce 3AM, a training-time enhancement that integrates 3D-aware features from MUSt3R into SAM2. Our lightweight Feature Merger fuses multi-level MUSt3R features that encode implicit geometric correspondence. Combined with SAM2's appearance features, the model achieves geometry-consistent recognition grounded in both spatial position and visual similarity. We propose a field-of-view aware sampling strategy ensuring frames observe spatially consistent object regions for reliable 3D correspondence learning. Critically, our method requires only RGB input at inference, with no camera poses or preprocessing. On challenging datasets with wide-baseline motion (ScanNet++, Replica), 3AM substantially outperforms SAM2 and extensions, achieving 90.6% IoU and 71.7% Positive IoU on ScanNet++'s Selected Subset, improving over state-of-the-art VOS methods by +15.9 and +30.4 points. Project page: https://jayisaking.github.io/3AM-Page/
tldr: The paper introduces 3AM, a training-time enhancement for video object segmentation that incorporates 3D-aware features to improve geometric consistency, especially under large viewpoint changes, while requiring only RGB input at inference.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了3AM，一种视频对象分割的训练时增强方法，它结合了3D感知特征以提高几何一致性，尤其是在视角发生大的变化时，并且在推理时只需要RGB输入。
summary_zh: 类似SAM2的视频目标分割方法虽可通过基于记忆的架构实现强大的性能，但在视角发生较大变化时，由于依赖于外观特征而表现不佳。传统的3D实例分割方法可解决视角一致性问题，但需要相机位姿、深度图和昂贵的预处理。我们引入了3AM，这是一种将MUSt3R的3D感知特征集成到SAM2中的训练时增强方法。我们轻量级的特征融合器融合了编码隐式几何对应关系的多层级MUSt3R特征。与SAM2的外观特征相结合，该模型实现了基于空间位置和视觉相似性的几何一致性识别。我们提出了一种视场感知采样策略，确保帧观察到空间一致的物体区域，以实现可靠的3D对应关系学习。关键的是，我们的方法在推理时仅需要RGB输入，无需相机位姿或预处理。在具有宽基线运动的具有挑战性的数据集（ScanNet++、Replica）上，3AM显著优于SAM2及其扩展，在ScanNet++的Selected Subset上实现了90.6%的IoU和71.7%的正IoU，比最先进的VOS方法分别提高了+15.9和+30.4个百分点。项目页面：https://jayisaking.github.io/3AM-Page/

title: Learning to Trust Experience: A Monitor-Trust-Regulator Framework for Learning under Unobservable Feedback Reliability
summary:
Learning under unobservable feedback reliability poses a distinct challenge beyond optimization robustness: a system must decide whether to learn from an experience, not only how to learn stably. We study this setting as Epistemic Identifiability under Unobservable Reliability (EIUR), where each experience has a latent credibility, reliable and unreliable feedback can be locally indistinguishable, and data are generated in a closed loop by the learner's own evolving beliefs and actions. In EIUR, standard robust learning can converge stably yet form high-confidence, systematically wrong beliefs.
  We propose metacognitive regulation as a practical response: a second, introspective control loop that infers experience credibility from endogenous evidence in the learner's internal dynamics. We formalize this as a modular Monitor-Trust-Regulator (MTR) decomposition and instantiate it with self-diagnosis, which maintains a slowly varying experience-trust variable that softly modulates learning updates, without exogenous reliability labels or an explicit corruption model.
  Empirically, in the EIUR regimes studied here, self-diagnosis is associated with improved epistemic identifiability. In reinforcement learning, it enables calibrated skepticism and recovery under systematically corrupted rewards. In supervised learning, it exposes a critical dissociation: performance recovery does not imply epistemic recovery. Accuracy can rebound while internal belief dynamics remain locked-in by early misleading data, a failure detectable only through introspective diagnostics. Together, MTR and self-diagnosis provide an organizing abstraction and a concrete design template for intrinsic reliability assessment in autonomous learning under unobservable reliability.
tldr: This paper introduces a Monitor-Trust-Regulator (MTR) framework for learning under unobservable feedback reliability, using self-diagnosis to infer experience credibility and improve epistemic identifiability, especially in reinforcement learning with corrupted rewards.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个Monitor-Trust-Regulator (MTR) 框架，用于在不可观察的反馈可靠性下进行学习。它使用自我诊断来推断经验可信度，提高认知可识别性，尤其是在具有损坏奖励的强化学习中。
summary_zh:
在不可观测的反馈可靠性下进行学习，除了优化鲁棒性之外，还面临一个独特的挑战：系统不仅必须决定如何稳定地学习，还必须决定是否从经验中学习。我们将此场景研究为不可观测可靠性下的认知可识别性 (EIUR)，其中每次经验都具有潜在的可信度，可靠和不可靠的反馈在局部上可能无法区分，并且数据是在一个闭环中由学习者自身不断演变的信念和行为产生的。在 EIUR 中，标准的鲁棒学习可以稳定地收敛，但会形成高置信度且系统性错误的信念。

我们提出元认知调节作为一种实际的应对方法：一个第二级别的、内省的控制回路，从学习者内部动力学的内生证据中推断经验的可信度。我们将其形式化为一个模块化的监视器-信任-调节器 (MTR) 分解，并用自我诊断来实现它，自我诊断维护一个缓慢变化的经验信任变量，该变量软性地调节学习更新，而无需外生的可靠性标签或显式的损坏模型。

在实证方面，在本文研究的 EIUR 机制中，自我诊断与改进的认知可识别性相关联。在强化学习中，它实现了校准的怀疑态度，并在系统性损坏的奖励下恢复。在监督学习中，它揭示了一个关键的解离：性能恢复并不意味着认知恢复。准确率可能会反弹，而内部信念动力学仍然会被早期误导性数据所锁定，这种失败只能通过内省诊断来检测。总之，MTR 和自我诊断为在不可观测可靠性下进行的自主学习中的内在可靠性评估提供了一个组织抽象和一个具体的设计模板。

title: SRT: Accelerating Reinforcement Learning via Speculative Rollout with Tree-Structured Cache
summary: We present Speculative Rollout with Tree-Structured Cache (SRT), a simple, model-free approach to accelerate on-policy reinforcement learning (RL) for language models without sacrificing distributional correctness. SRT exploits the empirical similarity of rollouts for the same prompt across training steps by storing previously generated continuations in a per-prompt tree-structured cache. During generation, the current policy uses this tree as the draft model for performing speculative decoding. To keep the cache fresh and improve draft model quality, SRT updates trees online from ongoing rollouts and proactively performs run-ahead generation during idle GPU bubbles. Integrated into standard RL pipelines (\textit{e.g.}, PPO, GRPO and DAPO) and multi-turn settings, SRT consistently reduces generation and step latency and lowers per-token inference cost, achieving up to 2.08x wall-clock time speedup during rollout.
tldr: The paper introduces SRT, a method that accelerates on-policy RL for language models using a tree-structured cache to store and reuse rollout continuations, resulting in significant speedups during rollout.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SRT，一种通过使用树状缓存存储和复用 rollout 延续来加速语言模型的 on-policy RL 的方法，从而在 rollout 期间实现了显著的加速。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种基于树结构缓存的推测性展开（SRT），这是一种简单且无需模型的策略上强化学习（RL）方法，旨在加速语言模型的训练，同时不牺牲分布正确性。SRT利用了相同提示词在不同训练步骤下的展开结果之间的经验相似性，通过将先前生成的延续存储在每个提示词对应的树结构缓存中来实现。在生成过程中，当前策略利用此树作为草稿模型进行推测性解码。为了保持缓存的新鲜度并提高草稿模型的质量，SRT从正在进行的展开过程中在线更新树，并在闲置 GPU 气泡期间主动执行前瞻性生成。集成到标准 RL 流程中（\*例如*，PPO、GRPO 和 DAPO）以及多轮设置中，SRT 能够始终如一地降低生成和迭代延迟，并降低每个 token 的推理成本，在展开过程中实现高达 2.08 倍的挂钟时间加速。

title: Multimodal Signal Processing For Thermo-Visible-Lidar Fusion In Real-time 3D Semantic Mapping
summary: In complex environments, autonomous robot navigation and environmental perception pose higher requirements for SLAM technology. This paper presents a novel method for semantically enhancing 3D point cloud maps with thermal information. By first performing pixel-level fusion of visible and infrared images, the system projects real-time LiDAR point clouds onto this fused image stream. It then segments heat source features in the thermal channel to instantly identify high temperature targets and applies this temperature information as a semantic layer on the final 3D map. This approach generates maps that not only have accurate geometry but also possess a critical semantic understanding of the environment, making it highly valuable for specific applications like rapid disaster assessment and industrial preventive maintenance.
tldr: This paper introduces a method for creating 3D semantic maps by fusing thermal, visual, and LiDAR data, improving scene understanding for applications like disaster assessment and industrial maintenance.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种融合热成像、可见光和激光雷达数据，创建3D语义地图的方法，提升了场景理解能力，适用于灾害评估和工业维护等应用。
summary_zh: 在复杂环境中，自主机器人导航和环境感知对SLAM技术提出了更高的要求。本文提出了一种利用热信息语义增强三维点云地图的新方法。该系统首先执行可见光和红外图像的像素级融合，然后将实时激光雷达点云投影到该融合图像流上。接下来，在热通道中分割热源特征，以即时识别高温目标，并将此温度信息作为语义层应用于最终三维地图。这种方法生成的地图不仅具有精确的几何结构，而且对环境具有关键的语义理解，使其在快速灾害评估和工业预防性维护等特定应用中具有很高的价值。

title: Fairness risk and its privacy-enabled solution in AI-driven robotic applications
summary: Complex decision-making by autonomous machines and algorithms could underpin the foundations of future society. Generative AI is emerging as a powerful engine for such transitions. However, we show that Generative AI-driven developments pose a critical pitfall: fairness concerns. In robotic applications, although intuitions about fairness are common, a precise and implementable definition that captures user utility and inherent data randomness is missing. Here we provide a utility-aware fairness metric for robotic decision making and analyze fairness jointly with user-data privacy, deriving conditions under which privacy budgets govern fairness metrics. This yields a unified framework that formalizes and quantifies fairness and its interplay with privacy, which is tested in a robot navigation task. In view of the fact that under legal requirements, most robotic systems will enforce user privacy, the approach shows surprisingly that such privacy budgets can be jointly used to meet fairness targets. Addressing fairness concerns in the creative combined consideration of privacy is a step towards ethical use of AI and strengthens trust in autonomous robots deployed in everyday environments.
tldr: The paper introduces a utility-aware fairness metric for robotic decision-making, analyzing its interplay with user privacy and demonstrating how privacy budgets can be leveraged to meet fairness targets in a robot navigation task.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种效用感知的机器人决策公平性度量标准，分析了其与用户隐私的相互作用，并展示了如何在机器人导航任务中利用隐私预算来实现公平性目标。
summary_zh: 自主机器和算法的复杂决策可能构成未来社会的基石。生成式人工智能正成为推动这种转变的强大引擎。然而，我们表明，生成式人工智能驱动的发展带来了一个至关重要的陷阱：公平性问题。在机器人应用中，尽管关于公平性的直觉很常见，但缺乏一个精确且可实施的定义，能够捕捉用户效用和固有的数据随机性。在此，我们为机器人决策提供了一个效用感知的公平性指标，并联合分析了公平性与用户数据隐私，推导出隐私预算控制公平性指标的条件。这产生了一个统一的框架，形式化和量化了公平性及其与隐私之间的相互作用，并在机器人导航任务中进行了测试。鉴于大多数机器人系统将在法律要求的约束下执行用户隐私，该方法令人惊讶地表明，这种隐私预算可以共同用于满足公平性目标。通过创造性地综合考虑隐私来解决公平性问题，是迈向AI伦理使用的重要一步，并增强了对部署在日常环境中的自主机器人的信任。

title: Policy-Based Reinforcement Learning with Action Masking for Dynamic Job Shop Scheduling under Uncertainty: Handling Random Arrivals and Machine Failures
summary: We present a novel framework for solving Dynamic Job Shop Scheduling Problems under uncertainty, addressing the challenges introduced by stochastic job arrivals and unexpected machine breakdowns. Our approach follows a model-based paradigm, using Coloured Timed Petri Nets to represent the scheduling environment, and Maskable Proximal Policy Optimization to enable dynamic decision-making while restricting the agent to feasible actions at each decision point. To simulate realistic industrial conditions, dynamic job arrivals are modeled using a Gamma distribution, which captures complex temporal patterns such as bursts, clustering, and fluctuating workloads. Machine failures are modeled using a Weibull distribution to represent age-dependent degradation and wear-out dynamics. These stochastic models enable the framework to reflect real-world manufacturing scenarios better. In addition, we study two action-masking strategies: a non-gradient approach that overrides the probabilities of invalid actions, and a gradient-based approach that assigns negative gradients to invalid actions within the policy network. We conduct extensive experiments on dynamic JSSP benchmarks, demonstrating that our method consistently outperforms traditional heuristic and rule-based approaches in terms of makespan minimization. The results highlight the strength of combining interpretable Petri-net-based models with adaptive reinforcement learning policies, yielding a resilient, scalable, and explainable framework for real-time scheduling in dynamic and uncertain manufacturing environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a policy-based reinforcement learning framework with action masking for dynamic job shop scheduling under uncertainty, demonstrating superior performance compared to traditional methods in makespan minimization.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于策略的强化学习框架，通过动作掩码解决不确定性下的动态作业车间调度问题，并在最小化完工时间方面表现优于传统方法。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种新的框架，用于解决不确定性下的动态作业车间调度问题，旨在应对随机作业到达和意外机器故障带来的挑战。我们的方法遵循基于模型的范式，使用着色时间Petri网来表示调度环境，并使用可屏蔽近端策略优化算法来实现动态决策，同时限制智能体在每个决策点上仅选择可行的动作。为了模拟真实的工业条件，动态作业到达采用Gamma分布建模，以捕捉诸如突发、聚类和波动工作负载等复杂的时间模式。机器故障采用Weibull分布建模，以表示与年龄相关的退化和磨损 динамика。这些随机模型使框架能够更好地反映真实世界的制造场景。此外，我们研究了两种动作屏蔽策略：一种非梯度方法，它覆盖无效动作的概率；以及一种基于梯度的方法，它在策略网络内为无效动作分配负梯度。我们在动态作业车间调度问题基准上进行了广泛的实验，结果表明我们的方法在最小化完工时间方面始终优于传统的启发式和基于规则的方法。结果突出了结合可解释的基于Petri网的模型与自适应强化学习策略的优势，从而为动态和不确定的制造环境中的实时调度提供了一个弹性、可扩展且可解释的框架。

title: SCE-SLAM: Scale-Consistent Monocular SLAM via Scene Coordinate Embeddings
summary: Monocular visual SLAM enables 3D reconstruction from internet video and autonomous navigation on resource-constrained platforms, yet suffers from scale drift, i.e., the gradual divergence of estimated scale over long sequences. Existing frame-to-frame methods achieve real-time performance through local optimization but accumulate scale drift due to the lack of global constraints among independent windows. To address this, we propose SCE-SLAM, an end-to-end SLAM system that maintains scale consistency through scene coordinate embeddings, which are learned patch-level representations encoding 3D geometric relationships under a canonical scale reference. The framework consists of two key modules: geometry-guided aggregation that leverages 3D spatial proximity to propagate scale information from historical observations through geometry-modulated attention, and scene coordinate bundle adjustment that anchors current estimates to the reference scale through explicit 3D coordinate constraints decoded from the scene coordinate embeddings. Experiments on KITTI, Waymo, and vKITTI demonstrate substantial improvements: our method reduces absolute trajectory error by 8.36m on KITTI compared to the best prior approach, while maintaining 36 FPS and achieving scale consistency across large-scale scenes.
tldr: The paper presents SCE-SLAM, a novel monocular SLAM system that addresses scale drift by using learned scene coordinate embeddings for scale consistency, demonstrating significant improvements in accuracy on standard datasets while maintaining real-time performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了SCE-SLAM，一种新颖的单目SLAM系统，通过使用学习的场景坐标嵌入来解决尺度漂移问题，从而保持尺度一致性，并在标准数据集上展示了显著的精度提升，同时保持了实时性能。
summary_zh: 单目视觉SLAM能够从互联网视频中进行3D重建，并在资源受限的平台上实现自主导航，但存在尺度漂移的问题，即在长序列中估计尺度的逐渐发散。现有的帧到帧方法通过局部优化实现实时性能，但由于独立窗口之间缺乏全局约束而累积了尺度漂移。为了解决这个问题，我们提出SCE-SLAM，一个端到端的SLAM系统，它通过场景坐标嵌入来保持尺度一致性，这些场景坐标嵌入是学习到的块级(patch-level)表示，编码了在标准尺度参考下3D几何关系。该框架由两个关键模块组成：几何引导的聚合，它利用3D空间邻近性，通过几何调制的注意力机制将尺度信息从历史观测中传播出来；以及场景坐标捆绑调整，它通过从场景坐标嵌入解码出的显式3D坐标约束，将当前估计锚定到参考尺度。在KITTI、Waymo和vKITTI上的实验表明了显著的改进：与之前最好的方法相比，我们的方法在KITTI上将绝对轨迹误差减少了8.36米，同时保持了36 FPS，并在大规模场景中实现了尺度一致性。

title: AquaFeat+: an Underwater Vision Learning-based Enhancement Method for Object Detection, Classification, and Tracking
summary: Underwater video analysis is particularly challenging due to factors such as low lighting, color distortion, and turbidity, which compromise visual data quality and directly impact the performance of perception modules in robotic applications. This work proposes AquaFeat+, a plug-and-play pipeline designed to enhance features specifically for automated vision tasks, rather than for human perceptual quality. The architecture includes modules for color correction, hierarchical feature enhancement, and an adaptive residual output, which are trained end-to-end and guided directly by the loss function of the final application. Trained and evaluated in the FishTrack23 dataset, AquaFeat+ achieves significant improvements in object detection, classification, and tracking metrics, validating its effectiveness for enhancing perception tasks in underwater robotic applications.
tldr: AquaFeat+ is a plug-and-play pipeline for enhancing underwater video features to improve object detection, classification, and tracking performance in robotic applications, achieving significant improvements on the FishTrack23 dataset.
tldr_zh: AquaFeat+是一个即插即用的流水线，旨在增强水下视频特征，从而提高机器人在目标检测、分类和跟踪方面的性能。该方法在FishTrack23数据集上取得了显著改进。
summary_zh: 水下视频分析极具挑战性，原因在于低光照、色彩失真和混浊度等因素会降低视觉数据质量，并直接影响机器人应用中感知模块的性能。本研究提出AquaFeat+，一种即插即用型管道，旨在增强专门用于自动化视觉任务的特征，而非改善人类感知质量。该架构包含色彩校正、分层特征增强和自适应残差输出等模块，这些模块经过端到端训练，并直接由最终应用程序的损失函数引导。在FishTrack23数据集上训练和评估后，AquaFeat+在目标检测、分类和跟踪指标上均取得了显著的提升，验证了其在增强水下机器人应用中感知任务的有效性。

title: Knowledge-Embedded and Hypernetwork-Guided Few-Shot Substation Meter Defect Image Generation Method
summary:
Substation meters play a critical role in monitoring and ensuring the stable operation of power grids, yet their detection of cracks and other physical defects is often hampered by a severe scarcity of annotated samples. To address this few-shot generation challenge, we propose a novel framework that integrates Knowledge Embedding and Hypernetwork-Guided Conditional Control into a Stable Diffusion pipeline, enabling realistic and controllable synthesis of defect images from limited data.
  First, we bridge the substantial domain gap between natural-image pre-trained models and industrial equipment by fine-tuning a Stable Diffusion backbone using DreamBooth-style knowledge embedding. This process encodes the unique structural and textural priors of substation meters, ensuring generated images retain authentic meter characteristics.
  Second, we introduce a geometric crack modeling module that parameterizes defect attributes--such as location, length, curvature, and branching pattern--to produce spatially constrained control maps. These maps provide precise, pixel-level guidance during generation.
  Third, we design a lightweight hypernetwork that dynamically modulates the denoising process of the diffusion model in response to the control maps and high-level defect descriptors, achieving a flexible balance between generation fidelity and controllability.
  Extensive experiments on a real-world substation meter dataset demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing augmentation and generation baselines. It reduces Frechet Inception Distance (FID) by 32.7%, increases diversity metrics, and--most importantly--boosts the mAP of a downstream defect detector by 15.3% when trained on augmented data. The framework offers a practical, high-quality data synthesis solution for industrial inspection systems where defect samples are rare.
tldr: This paper presents a novel few-shot image generation method for substation meter defects by integrating knowledge embedding and hypernetwork-guided conditional control into a Stable Diffusion pipeline, demonstrating improved performance in data augmentation and downstream defect detection.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的少样本图像生成方法，用于生成变电站仪表缺陷图像，通过将知识嵌入和超网络引导的条件控制集成到Stable Diffusion流程中，展示了在数据增强和下游缺陷检测方面的性能提升。
summary_zh:
变电站仪表在监控和确保电网稳定运行方面发挥着关键作用，然而，由于带标注样本的严重匮乏，对其裂纹和其他物理缺陷的检测常常受到阻碍。为了应对这种小样本生成挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，将知识嵌入和超网络引导的条件控制集成到Stable Diffusion流程中，从而能够从有限的数据中实现缺陷图像的逼真且可控的合成。

首先，我们通过使用DreamBooth风格的知识嵌入微调Stable Diffusion骨干网络，弥合了自然图像预训练模型与工业设备之间巨大的领域差距。 这一过程编码了变电站仪表独特的结构和纹理先验知识，确保生成的图像保留真实的仪表特征。

其次，我们引入了一个几何裂纹建模模块，该模块参数化了缺陷属性——如位置、长度、曲率和分支模式——以产生空间约束的控制图。这些图在生成过程中提供精确的像素级指导。

第三，我们设计了一个轻量级超网络，该网络动态地调节扩散模型的去噪过程，以响应控制图和高级缺陷描述符，从而在生成保真度和可控性之间实现灵活的平衡。

在真实变电站仪表数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法显著优于现有的增强和生成基线。它将Frechet Inception Distance (FID)降低了32.7%，提高了多样性指标，并且最重要的是，当使用增强数据进行训练时，下游缺陷检测器的mAP提高了15.3%。该框架为缺陷样本稀缺的工业检测系统提供了一种实用的、高质量的数据合成解决方案。

title: Preliminary Tests of the Anticipatory Classifier System with Hindsight Experience Replay
summary: This paper introduces ACS2HER, a novel integration of the Anticipatory Classifier System (ACS2) with the Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) mechanism. While ACS2 is highly effective at building cognitive maps through latent learning, its performance often stagnates in environments characterized by sparse rewards. We propose a specific architectural variant that triggers hindsight learning when the agent fails to reach its primary goal, re-labeling visited states as virtual goals to densify the learning signal. The proposed model was evaluated on two benchmarks: the deterministic \texttt{Maze 6} and the stochastic \texttt{FrozenLake}. The results demonstrate that ACS2HER significantly accelerates knowledge acquisition and environmental mastery compared to the standard ACS2. However, this efficiency gain is accompanied by increased computational overhead and a substantial expansion in classifier numerosity. This work provides the first analysis of combining anticipatory mechanisms with retrospective goal-relabeling in Learning Classifier Systems.
tldr: The paper introduces ACS2HER, which combines the Anticipatory Classifier System (ACS2) with Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) to improve performance in sparse reward environments, showing faster learning but increased computational cost.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ACS2HER，它结合了预期分类器系统(ACS2)和后见之明经验回放(HER)，以提高在稀疏奖励环境中的性能，显示出更快的学习速度，但计算成本增加。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型集成方案ACS2HER，该方案将前瞻性分类器系统（ACS2）与后见之明经验回放（HER）机制相结合。尽管ACS2在通过潜在学习构建认知地图方面非常有效，但其性能在以稀疏奖励为特征的环境中通常会停滞不前。我们提出了一种特定的架构变体，当智能体未能达到其主要目标时，该变体会触发后见之明学习，将访问过的状态重新标记为虚拟目标，从而密集化学习信号。所提出的模型在两个基准测试上进行了评估：确定性的\texttt{Maze 6}和随机性的\texttt{FrozenLake}。结果表明，与标准ACS2相比，ACS2HER显著加速了知识获取和环境熟练度。然而，效率的提高伴随着计算开销的增加和分类器数量的显著扩展。这项工作提供了在学习分类器系统中将前瞻性机制与回顾性目标重标记相结合的首次分析。

title: Feedback-Based Mobile Robot Navigation in 3-D Environments Using Artificial Potential Functions Technical Report
summary: This technical report presents the construction and analysis of polynomial navigation functions for motion planning in 3-D workspaces populated by spherical and cylindrical obstacles. The workspace is modeled as a bounded spherical region, and obstacles are encoded using smooth polynomial implicit functions. We establish conditions under which the proposed navigation functions admit a unique non-degenerate minimum at the target while avoiding local minima, including in the presence of pairwise intersecting obstacles. Gradient and Hessian analyses are provided, and the theoretical results are validated through numerical simulations in obstacle rich 3-D environments.
tldr: This paper introduces polynomial navigation functions for 3D robot motion planning, ensuring a unique global minimum at the target and avoiding local minima even with intersecting spherical and cylindrical obstacles. The method is validated through numerical simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于多项式导航函数的三维机器人运动规划方法，旨在确保目标位置存在唯一的全局最小值，并避免局部最小值，即使在球形和圆柱形障碍物相交的情况下也是如此。该方法通过数值模拟进行了验证。
summary_zh: 该技术报告介绍了针对三维工作空间中的运动规划的多项式导航函数的构建和分析，其中工作空间中分布着球形和圆柱形障碍物。工作空间被建模为一个有界的球形区域，障碍物使用平滑的多项式隐函数进行编码。我们确立了在以下条件下，所提出的导航函数在目标点处存在唯一的非退化最小值，同时避免局部最小值，包括在成对相交的障碍物存在的情况下。报告提供了梯度和 Hessian 分析，并通过在障碍物密集的 3D 环境中的数值模拟验证了理论结果。

title: GlovEgo-HOI: Bridging the Synthetic-to-Real Gap for Industrial Egocentric Human-Object Interaction Detection
summary: Egocentric Human-Object Interaction (EHOI) analysis is crucial for industrial safety, yet the development of robust models is hindered by the scarcity of annotated domain-specific data. We address this challenge by introducing a data generation framework that combines synthetic data with a diffusion-based process to augment real-world images with realistic Personal Protective Equipment (PPE). We present GlovEgo-HOI, a new benchmark dataset for industrial EHOI, and GlovEgo-Net, a model integrating Glove-Head and Keypoint- Head modules to leverage hand pose information for enhanced interaction detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed data generation framework and GlovEgo-Net. To foster further research, we release the GlovEgo-HOI dataset, augmentation pipeline, and pre-trained models at: GitHub project.
tldr: The paper introduces GlovEgo-HOI, a new benchmark dataset and model (GlovEgo-Net) for egocentric human-object interaction detection in industrial settings, addressing the data scarcity issue by using a synthetic data generation framework with realistic PPE augmentation. They release the dataset, pipeline, and pre-trained models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了GlovEgo-HOI，这是一个新的基准数据集和模型（GlovEgo-Net），用于工业环境中以自我为中心的人-物交互检测。它通过使用合成数据生成框架和逼真的PPE增强来解决数据稀缺问题。他们发布了数据集、流程和预训练模型。
summary_zh: 以自我为中心的人-物交互(EHOI)分析对于工业安全至关重要，但由于缺乏带标注的特定领域数据，鲁棒模型的开发受到阻碍。我们通过引入一种数据生成框架来应对这一挑战，该框架结合了合成数据和一个基于扩散的过程，以使用逼真的个人防护装备(PPE)来增强真实世界的图像。我们提出了GlovEgo-HOI，一个针对工业EHOI的新基准数据集，以及GlovEgo-Net，一个整合了 Glove-Head 和 Keypoint-Head 模块的模型，以利用手部姿势信息来增强交互检测。 广泛的实验证明了所提出的数据生成框架和 GlovEgo-Net 的有效性。 为了促进进一步的研究，我们在 GitHub 项目中发布了 GlovEgo-HOI 数据集、增强流程和预训练模型。

title: V-DPM: 4D Video Reconstruction with Dynamic Point Maps
summary: Powerful 3D representations such as DUSt3R invariant point maps, which encode 3D shape and camera parameters, have significantly advanced feed forward 3D reconstruction. While point maps assume static scenes, Dynamic Point Maps (DPMs) extend this concept to dynamic 3D content by additionally representing scene motion. However, existing DPMs are limited to image pairs and, like DUSt3R, require post processing via optimization when more than two views are involved. We argue that DPMs are more useful when applied to videos and introduce V-DPM to demonstrate this. First, we show how to formulate DPMs for video input in a way that maximizes representational power, facilitates neural prediction, and enables reuse of pretrained models. Second, we implement these ideas on top of VGGT, a recent and powerful 3D reconstructor. Although VGGT was trained on static scenes, we show that a modest amount of synthetic data is sufficient to adapt it into an effective V-DPM predictor. Our approach achieves state of the art performance in 3D and 4D reconstruction for dynamic scenes. In particular, unlike recent dynamic extensions of VGGT such as P3, DPMs recover not only dynamic depth but also the full 3D motion of every point in the scene.
tldr: The paper introduces V-DPM, an extension of Dynamic Point Maps (DPMs) for 4D video reconstruction, leveraging VGGT and synthetic data to achieve state-of-the-art performance in dynamic scene reconstruction, including 3D motion recovery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了V-DPM，一种用于4D视频重建的动态点图（DPMs）扩展方法，利用VGGT和合成数据在动态场景重建中实现了最先进的性能，包括3D运动恢复。
summary_zh: 诸如编码了3D形状和相机参数的 DUSt3R 不变点云图之类的强大3D表示方法，已显著推进了前馈3D重建技术的发展。虽然点云图假定场景是静态的，但动态点云图 (DPM) 通过额外表示场景运动，将这一概念扩展到动态3D内容。 然而，现有的DPM仅限于图像对，并且与DUSt3R一样，当涉及两个以上的视角时，需要通过优化进行后处理。我们认为，DPM应用于视频时更有用，并引入V-DPM来证明这一点。首先，我们展示了如何针对视频输入制定DPM，以便最大化表示能力，促进神经预测，并支持重用预训练模型。其次，我们在VGGT（一种最新的、功能强大的3D重建器）的基础上实现了这些想法。尽管VGGT是在静态场景上训练的，但我们表明，少量合成数据就足以将其改编为有效的V-DPM预测器。我们的方法在动态场景的3D和4D重建中实现了最先进的性能。 特别是，与最近的VGGT动态扩展（如P3）不同，DPM不仅可以恢复动态深度，还可以恢复场景中每个点的完整3D运动。

title: GaussianFluent: Gaussian Simulation for Dynamic Scenes with Mixed Materials
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has emerged as a prominent 3D representation for high-fidelity and real-time rendering. Prior work has coupled physics simulation with Gaussians, but predominantly targets soft, deformable materials, leaving brittle fracture largely unresolved. This stems from two key obstacles: the lack of volumetric interiors with coherent textures in GS representation, and the absence of fracture-aware simulation methods for Gaussians. To address these challenges, we introduce GaussianFluent, a unified framework for realistic simulation and rendering of dynamic object states. First, it synthesizes photorealistic interiors by densifying internal Gaussians guided by generative models. Second, it integrates an optimized Continuum Damage Material Point Method (CD-MPM) to enable brittle fracture simulation at remarkably high speed. Our approach handles complex scenarios including mixed-material objects and multi-stage fracture propagation, achieving results infeasible with previous methods. Experiments clearly demonstrate GaussianFluent's capability for photo-realistic, real-time rendering with structurally consistent interiors, highlighting its potential for downstream application, such as VR and Robotics.
tldr: GaussianFluent introduces a method to simulate and render dynamic scenes with mixed materials, specifically addressing brittle fracture in 3D Gaussian Splatting through interior synthesis and an optimized CD-MPM, enabling realistic real-time rendering.
tldr_zh: GaussianFluent 提出了一种模拟和渲染具有混合材料的动态场景的方法，通过内部合成和优化的 CD-MPM 解决了 3D 高斯溅射中的脆性断裂问题，从而实现了逼真的实时渲染。
summary_zh: 3D高斯溅射(3DGS)已成为高保真和实时渲染的一种突出的3D表达方式。先前的工作已将物理模拟与高斯函数相结合，但主要针对柔软、可变形材料，而脆性断裂在很大程度上仍未解决。这源于两个关键障碍：GS表示中缺乏具有连贯纹理的体积内部，以及缺乏针对高斯函数的考虑断裂的模拟方法。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了GaussianFluent，一个用于动态对象状态的真实模拟和渲染的统一框架。首先，它通过生成模型引导的内部高斯函数的稠密化，来合成逼真的内部。其次，它集成了优化的连续损伤材料点法(CD-MPM)，从而能够以极高的速度进行脆性断裂模拟。我们的方法可以处理包括混合材料对象和多阶段断裂传播在内的复杂场景，实现了以前的方法无法实现的结果。实验清楚地表明了GaussianFluent具有结构一致的内部的逼真、实时渲染能力，突出了其在下游应用中的潜力，例如VR和机器人技术。

title: DeTracker: Motion-decoupled Vehicle Detection and Tracking in Unstabilized Satellite Videos
summary: Satellite videos provide continuous observations of surface dynamics but pose significant challenges for multi-object tracking (MOT), especially under unstabilized conditions where platform jitter and the weak appearance of tiny objects jointly degrade tracking performance. To address this problem, we propose DeTracker, a joint detection-and-tracking framework tailored for unstabilized satellite videos. DeTracker introduces a Global--Local Motion Decoupling (GLMD) module that explicitly separates satellite platform motion from true object motion through global alignment and local refinement, leading to improved trajectory stability and motion estimation accuracy. In addition, a Temporal Dependency Feature Pyramid (TDFP) module is developed to perform cross-frame temporal feature fusion, enhancing the continuity and discriminability of tiny-object representations. We further construct a new benchmark dataset, SDM-Car-SU, which simulates multi-directional and multi-speed platform motions to enable systematic evaluation of tracking robustness under varying motion perturbations. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real unstabilized satellite videos demonstrate that DeTracker significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving 61.1% MOTA on SDM-Car-SU and 47.3% MOTA on real satellite video data.
tldr: The paper introduces DeTracker, a new framework for vehicle detection and tracking in unstabilized satellite videos, using motion decoupling and temporal feature fusion to improve accuracy, and proposes a new benchmark dataset for evaluation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了DeTracker，一个用于不稳定的卫星视频中车辆检测和跟踪的新框架。它采用运动解耦和时间特征融合来提高准确性，并提出了一个新的基准数据集用于评估。
summary_zh: 卫星视频提供对地表动态的连续观测，但对多目标跟踪(MOT)提出了严峻挑战，尤其是在非稳态条件下，平台抖动和微小目标的弱外观共同降低了跟踪性能。为了解决这个问题，我们提出DeTracker，一个为非稳态卫星视频定制的联合检测和跟踪框架。DeTracker引入了全局-局部运动解耦(GLMD)模块，通过全局对齐和局部精细化，显式地将卫星平台运动从真实物体运动中分离出来，从而提高了轨迹稳定性和运动估计精度。此外，我们还开发了一个时间依赖特征金字塔(TDFP)模块，以执行跨帧时间特征融合，增强微小目标表征的连续性和区分度。我们进一步构建了一个新的基准数据集SDM-Car-SU，模拟多方向和多速度的平台运动，以实现对不同运动扰动下跟踪鲁棒性的系统评估。在模拟和真实非稳态卫星视频上进行的大量实验表明，DeTracker显著优于现有方法，在SDM-Car-SU上达到61.1%的MOTA，在真实卫星视频数据上达到47.3%的MOTA。

title: From Snow to Rain: Evaluating Robustness, Calibration, and Complexity of Model-Based Robust Training
summary: Robustness to natural corruptions remains a critical challenge for reliable deep learning, particularly in safety-sensitive domains. We study a family of model-based training approaches that leverage a learned nuisance variation model to generate realistic corruptions, as well as new hybrid strategies that combine random coverage with adversarial refinement in nuisance space. Using the Challenging Unreal and Real Environments for Traffic Sign Recognition dataset (CURE-TSR), with Snow and Rain corruptions, we evaluate accuracy, calibration, and training complexity across corruption severities. Our results show that model-based methods consistently outperform baselines Vanilla, Adversarial Training, and AugMix baselines, with model-based adversarial training providing the strongest robustness under across all corruptions but at the expense of higher computation and model-based data augmentation achieving comparable robustness with $T$ less computational complexity without incurring a statistically significant drop in performance. These findings highlight the importance of learned nuisance models for capturing natural variability, and suggest a promising path toward more resilient and calibrated models under challenging conditions.
tldr: This paper explores model-based training methods that use learned nuisance variation models to enhance the robustness and calibration of deep learning models against natural corruptions like snow and rain in traffic sign recognition, showing improved performance over baseline methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文探索了基于模型的训练方法，该方法利用学习到的干扰变化模型来增强深度学习模型在交通标志识别中对雪和雨等自然损坏的鲁棒性和校准，结果表明性能优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 针对自然扰动的鲁棒性仍然是可靠深度学习面临的关键挑战，尤其是在安全攸关的领域。我们研究了一系列基于模型的训练方法，这些方法利用学习到的干扰变化模型来生成逼真的扰动，以及将随机覆盖与干扰空间中的对抗性细化相结合的新型混合策略。我们使用交通标志识别挑战性真实和非真实环境数据集（CURE-TSR），其中包含雪和雨扰动，评估了在不同扰动程度下的准确率、校准性和训练复杂度。我们的结果表明，基于模型的方法始终优于基线方法 Vanilla、对抗训练和 AugMix，其中基于模型的对抗训练在所有扰动下提供最强的鲁棒性，但代价是更高的计算成本；而基于模型的数据增强实现了相当的鲁棒性，同时计算复杂度降低了 $T$ 倍，且性能上没有出现统计意义上的显著下降。这些发现突出了学习到的干扰模型在捕捉自然可变性方面的重要性，并为在具有挑战性的条件下构建更具弹性和校准性的模型提供了一条有希望的途径。

title: SAM-pose2seg: Pose-Guided Human Instance Segmentation in Crowds
summary: Segment Anything (SAM) provides an unprecedented foundation for human segmentation, but may struggle under occlusion, where keypoints may be partially or fully invisible. We adapt SAM 2.1 for pose-guided segmentation with minimal encoder modifications, retaining its strong generalization. Using a fine-tuning strategy called PoseMaskRefine, we incorporate pose keypoints with high visibility into the iterative correction process originally employed by SAM, yielding improved robustness and accuracy across multiple datasets. During inference, we simplify prompting by selecting only the three keypoints with the highest visibility. This strategy reduces sensitivity to common errors, such as missing body parts or misclassified clothing, and allows accurate mask prediction from as few as a single keypoint. Our results demonstrate that pose-guided fine-tuning of SAM enables effective, occlusion-aware human segmentation while preserving the generalization capabilities of the original model. The code and pretrained models will be available at https://mirapurkrabek.github.io/BBox-MaskPose.
tldr: This paper presents a pose-guided fine-tuning method (PoseMaskRefine) for SAM to improve human instance segmentation in crowded scenes, especially under occlusion, by incorporating pose keypoints with high visibility. They simplified prompting by selecting only the three keypoints with highest visibility leading to more robust and accurate mask predictions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于姿态引导的SAM微调方法 (PoseMaskRefine)，通过整合高可见度的姿态关键点，以提高在拥挤场景中，尤其是在遮挡情况下的人体实例分割性能。他们通过只选择三个可见性最高的关键点来简化提示，从而实现更强大、更准确的掩码预测。
summary_zh: 分割一切模型（SAM）为人体分割提供了一个前所未有的基础，但在遮挡情况下可能会遇到困难，因为关键点可能部分或完全不可见。我们对SAM 2.1进行了适配，使其能够进行姿态引导的分割，并对编码器进行了最小的修改，从而保留了其强大的泛化能力。通过一种名为PoseMaskRefine的微调策略，我们将具有高可见性的姿态关键点整合到SAM原有的迭代校正过程中，从而提高了多个数据集上的鲁棒性和准确性。在推理过程中，我们仅选择三个可见性最高的关键点来简化提示。这种策略降低了对常见错误的敏感性，例如身体部位缺失或服装分类错误，并允许仅从单个关键点进行准确的掩码预测。我们的结果表明，对SAM进行姿态引导的微调能够实现有效的、具有遮挡感知的人体分割，同时保留原始模型的泛化能力。代码和预训练模型将在https://mirapurkrabek.github.io/BBox-MaskPose 上提供。

title: Terminally constrained flow-based generative models from an optimal control perspective
summary: We address the problem of sampling from terminally constrained distributions with pre-trained flow-based generative models through an optimal control formulation. Theoretically, we characterize the value function by a Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation and derive the optimal feedback control as the minimizer of the associated Hamiltonian. We show that as the control penalty increases, the controlled process recovers the reference distribution, while as the penalty vanishes, the terminal law converges to a generalized Wasserstein projection onto the constraint manifold. Algorithmically, we introduce Terminal Optimal Control with Flow-based models (TOCFlow), a geometry-aware sampling-time guidance method for pre-trained flows. Solving the control problem in a terminal co-moving frame that tracks reference trajectories yields a closed-form scalar damping factor along the Riemannian gradient, capturing second-order curvature effects without matrix inversions. TOCFlow therefore matches the geometric consistency of Gauss-Newton updates at the computational cost of standard gradient guidance. We evaluate TOCFlow on three high-dimensional scientific tasks spanning equality, inequality, and global statistical constraints, namely Darcy flow, constrained trajectory planning, and turbulence snapshot generation with Kolmogorov spectral scaling. Across all settings, TOCFlow improves constraint satisfaction over Euclidean guidance and projection baselines while preserving the reference model's generative quality.
tldr: The paper introduces TOCFlow, a novel method to sample from terminally constrained distributions using flow-based generative models and optimal control, showing improved performance across several scientific tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了TOCFlow，一种新颖的方法，利用基于流的生成模型和最优控制从终端约束分布中进行采样，并在多个科学任务中表现出更好的性能。
summary_zh: 我们通过最优控制框架，解决了使用预训练的基于流的生成模型从终端约束分布中采样的问题。理论上，我们用Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程刻画了价值函数，并推导出最优反馈控制为相关哈密顿量的极小值。我们证明，随着控制惩罚的增加，受控过程恢复参考分布；而当惩罚消失时，终端定律收敛到约束流形上的广义Wasserstein投影。在算法上，我们引入了基于流模型具有终端最优控制（TOCFlow）的算法，这是一种用于预训练流的几何感知采样时间引导方法。在跟踪参考轨迹的终端随动框架中求解控制问题，会产生一个沿黎曼梯度的闭合形式标量阻尼因子，在不进行矩阵求逆的情况下捕获二阶曲率效应。因此，TOCFlow在标准梯度引导的计算成本下，实现了与Gauss-Newton更新方法一致的几何一致性。我们在三个高维科学任务中评估了TOCFlow，这些任务涵盖了等式、不等式和全局统计约束，即Darcy流、约束轨迹规划以及具有Kolmogorov谱尺度的湍流快照生成。在所有设置中，TOCFlow相对于欧几里得引导和投影基线，提高了约束满足度，同时保留了参考模型的生成质量。

title: Draw it like Euclid: Teaching transformer models to generate CAD profiles using ruler and compass construction steps
summary: We introduce a new method of generating Computer Aided Design (CAD) profiles via a sequence of simple geometric constructions including curve offsetting, rotations and intersections. These sequences start with geometry provided by a designer and build up the points and curves of the final profile step by step. We demonstrate that adding construction steps between the designer's input geometry and the final profile improves generation quality in a similar way to the introduction of a chain of thought in language models. Similar to the constraints in a parametric CAD model, the construction sequences reduce the degrees of freedom in the modeled shape to a small set of parameter values which can be adjusted by the designer, allowing parametric editing with the constructed geometry evaluated to floating point precision. In addition we show that applying reinforcement learning to the construction sequences gives further improvements over a wide range of metrics, including some which were not explicitly optimized.
tldr: The paper introduces a method for generating CAD profiles using geometric construction sequences learned by transformer models, enhanced with reinforcement learning, to improve generation quality and enable parametric editing.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种使用几何构造序列生成CAD轮廓的方法，该序列由transformer模型学习，并通过强化学习增强，从而提高生成质量并实现参数化编辑。
summary_zh: 我们介绍了一种生成计算机辅助设计（CAD）轮廓的新方法，该方法通过一系列简单的几何构造实现，包括曲线偏移、旋转和相交。这些序列以设计师提供的几何图形为起点，逐步构建最终轮廓的点和曲线。我们证明，在设计师的输入几何图形和最终轮廓之间添加构造步骤可以提高生成质量，类似于在语言模型中引入思维链。与参数化CAD模型中的约束类似，构造序列将建模形状的自由度降低到一小部分参数值，设计师可以调整这些参数值，从而实现参数化编辑，并以浮点精度评估构造的几何图形。此外，我们还表明，将强化学习应用于构造序列，可以在包括一些未明确优化的指标在内的广泛指标上获得进一步的改进。

title: Design Methodology of Hydraulically-driven Soft Robotic Gripper for a Large and Heavy Object
summary: This paper presents a design methodology of a hydraulically-driven soft robotic gripper for grasping a large and heavy object -- approximately 10 - 20 kg with 20 - 30 cm diameter. Most existing soft grippers are pneumatically actuated with several hundred kPa pressure, and cannot generate output force sufficient for such a large and heavy object. Instead of pneumatic actuation, hydraulic actuation has a potential to generate much larger power by several MPa pressure. In this study, we develop a hydraulically-driven soft gripper, in which its basic design parameters are determined based on a mathematical model that represents the relationship among the driving pressure, bending angle, object mass and grasping force. Moreover, we selected materials suitable for grasping a heavier object, based on the finite element analysis result of the detailed design. We report experimental results on a 20 kg object grasping and closed-loop control of the finger bending angle.
tldr: This paper presents a hydraulically-actuated soft robotic gripper designed to grasp large, heavy objects (10-20kg), using mathematical modeling and FEA for design and material selection, demonstrating successful grasping and closed-loop control.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种液压驱动的软体机器人夹爪，旨在抓取大型重物（10-20公斤）。该设计采用数学建模和有限元分析进行设计和材料选择，实验结果展示了成功的抓取和闭环控制。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种液压驱动软体机器人夹持器的设计方法，用于抓取大型重物——约10-20公斤，直径20-30厘米。现有的大多数软体夹持器采用气动驱动，压力为数百千帕，无法产生足够大的输出力来抓取如此大型重物。与气动驱动不同，液压驱动有潜力通过数兆帕的压力产生更大的功率。在本研究中，我们开发了一种液压驱动的软体夹持器，其基本设计参数基于一个数学模型确定，该模型表示了驱动压力、弯曲角度、物体质量和夹持力之间的关系。此外，我们基于详细设计的有限元分析结果，选择了适合抓取更重物体的材料。我们报告了关于抓取20公斤物体的实验结果，以及手指弯曲角度的闭环控制结果。

title: HGATSolver: A Heterogeneous Graph Attention Solver for Fluid-Structure Interaction
summary: Fluid-structure interaction (FSI) systems involve distinct physical domains, fluid and solid, governed by different partial differential equations and coupled at a dynamic interface. While learning-based solvers offer a promising alternative to costly numerical simulations, existing methods struggle to capture the heterogeneous dynamics of FSI within a unified framework. This challenge is further exacerbated by inconsistencies in response across domains due to interface coupling and by disparities in learning difficulty across fluid and solid regions, leading to instability during prediction. To address these challenges, we propose the Heterogeneous Graph Attention Solver (HGATSolver). HGATSolver encodes the system as a heterogeneous graph, embedding physical structure directly into the model via distinct node and edge types for fluid, solid, and interface regions. This enables specialized message-passing mechanisms tailored to each physical domain. To stabilize explicit time stepping, we introduce a novel physics-conditioned gating mechanism that serves as a learnable, adaptive relaxation factor. Furthermore, an Inter-domain Gradient-Balancing Loss dynamically balances the optimization objectives across domains based on predictive uncertainty. Extensive experiments on two constructed FSI benchmarks and a public dataset demonstrate that HGATSolver achieves state-of-the-art performance, establishing an effective framework for surrogate modeling of coupled multi-physics systems.
tldr: The paper introduces HGATSolver, a novel heterogeneous graph attention network-based solver for Fluid-Structure Interaction (FSI) problems, addressing challenges in capturing heterogeneous dynamics and instability through specialized message passing and gradient balancing.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了HGATSolver，一种新颖的基于异构图注意力网络的流固耦合（FSI）问题求解器，通过专门的消息传递和梯度平衡来解决捕获异构动力学和不稳定性的挑战。
summary_zh: 流固耦合 (FSI) 系统涉及截然不同的物理域，即流体和固体，分别由不同的偏微分方程控制，并在动态界面处耦合。虽然基于学习的求解器为替代昂贵的数值模拟提供了一个有希望的方案，但现有方法难以在统一框架内捕获流固耦合的异构动力学特性。由于界面耦合导致不同域之间的响应不一致，以及流体和固体区域学习难度差异，使得这一挑战进一步加剧，从而导致预测期间的不稳定性。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了异构图注意力求解器 (HGATSolver)。HGATSolver 将系统编码为异构图，通过为流体、固体和界面区域设置不同的节点和边类型，将物理结构直接嵌入模型中。这使得能够针对每个物理域定制专门的消息传递机制。为了稳定显式时间步进，我们引入了一种新颖的物理条件门控机制，该机制充当可学习的、自适应的松弛因子。此外，域间梯度平衡损失根据预测不确定性动态平衡不同域的优化目标。在两个构建的流固耦合基准和一个公共数据集上的大量实验表明，HGATSolver 实现了最先进的性能，为耦合多物理场系统的代理建模建立了一个有效的框架。

title: Thermo-LIO: A Novel Multi-Sensor Integrated System for Structural Health Monitoring
summary: Traditional two-dimensional thermography, despite being non-invasive and useful for defect detection in the construction field, is limited in effectively assessing complex geometries, inaccessible areas, and subsurface defects. This paper introduces Thermo-LIO, a novel multi-sensor system that can enhance Structural Health Monitoring (SHM) by fusing thermal imaging with high-resolution LiDAR. To achieve this, the study first develops a multimodal fusion method combining thermal imaging and LiDAR, enabling precise calibration and synchronization of multimodal data streams to create accurate representations of temperature distributions in buildings. Second, it integrates this fusion approach with LiDAR-Inertial Odometry (LIO), enabling full coverage of large-scale structures and allowing for detailed monitoring of temperature variations and defect detection across inspection cycles. Experimental validations, including case studies on a bridge and a hall building, demonstrate that Thermo-LIO can detect detailed thermal anomalies and structural defects more accurately than traditional methods. The system enhances diagnostic precision, enables real-time processing, and expands inspection coverage, highlighting the crucial role of multimodal sensor integration in advancing SHM methodologies for large-scale civil infrastructure.
tldr: The paper introduces Thermo-LIO, a multi-sensor system fusing thermal imaging and LiDAR with LIO for Structural Health Monitoring of large-scale infrastructure, demonstrating improved defect detection accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Thermo-LIO的多传感器系统，该系统融合了热成像和激光雷达与LIO，用于大型基础设施的结构健康监测，并展示了改进的缺陷检测精度。
summary_zh: 传统二维热成像技术，尽管具有非侵入性且在建筑领域中可用于缺陷检测，但在有效评估复杂几何形状、难以进入的区域以及次表面缺陷方面存在局限性。本文介绍了一种新型多传感器系统Thermo-LIO，它可以通过融合热成像和高分辨率激光雷达来增强结构健康监测（SHM）。为了实现这一点，该研究首先开发了一种多模态融合方法，将热成像和激光雷达相结合，从而能够精确校准和同步多模态数据流，以创建建筑物中温度分布的精确表示。其次，它将这种融合方法与激光雷达惯性里程计（LIO）相结合，从而能够全面覆盖大型结构，并允许在整个检测周期内对温度变化和缺陷检测进行详细监测。包括桥梁和一个大厅建筑的案例研究在内的实验验证表明，Thermo-LIO可以比传统方法更准确地检测到详细的热异常和结构缺陷。该系统提高了诊断精度，实现了实时处理，并扩大了检测范围，突出了多模态传感器集成在推进大型土木基础设施结构健康监测方法论中的关键作用。

title: Comprehensive Machine Learning Benchmarking for Fringe Projection Profilometry with Photorealistic Synthetic Data
summary: Machine learning approaches for fringe projection profilometry (FPP) are hindered by the lack of large, diverse datasets and comprehensive benchmarking protocols. This paper introduces the first open-source, photorealistic synthetic dataset for FPP, generated using NVIDIA Isaac Sim with 15,600 fringe images and 300 depth reconstructions across 50 diverse objects. We benchmark four neural network architectures (UNet, Hformer, ResUNet, Pix2Pix) on single-shot depth reconstruction, revealing that all models achieve similar performance (58-77 mm RMSE) despite substantial architectural differences. Our results demonstrate fundamental limitations of direct fringe-to-depth mapping without explicit phase information, with reconstruction errors approaching 75-95\% of the typical object depth range. This resource provides standardized evaluation protocols enabling systematic comparison and development of learning-based FPP approaches.
tldr: This paper introduces a photorealistic synthetic dataset for Fringe Projection Profilometry (FPP) and benchmarks several neural network architectures for single-shot depth reconstruction, finding limitations in direct fringe-to-depth mapping.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个用于条纹投影三维测量(FPP)的光真实感合成数据集，并对几种用于单次深度重建的神经网络架构进行了基准测试，发现直接从条纹到深度映射存在局限性。
summary_zh: 条纹投影轮廓术（FPP）的机器学习方法受限于大型、多样化数据集和全面基准测试协议的缺乏。本文介绍了首个开源、照片级真实感 FPP 合成数据集，该数据集使用 NVIDIA Isaac Sim 生成，包含 15,600 张条纹图像和 50 个不同物体的 300 次深度重建。我们对四种神经网络架构（UNet、Hformer、ResUNet、Pix2Pix）进行了单次拍摄深度重建的基准测试，结果表明，尽管架构差异很大，但所有模型都达到了相似的性能（58-77 毫米 RMSE）。我们的结果表明，在没有明确相位信息的情况下，直接条纹到深度映射存在根本性局限，重建误差接近典型物体深度范围的 75-95％。该资源提供了标准化评估协议，能够对基于学习的 FPP 方法进行系统比较和开发。

title: High-fidelity lunar topographic reconstruction across diverse terrain and illumination environments using deep learning
summary: Topographic models are essential for characterizing planetary surfaces and for inferring underlying geological processes. Nevertheless, meter-scale topographic data remain limited, which constrains detailed planetary investigations, even for the Moon, where extensive high-resolution orbital images are available. Recent advances in deep learning (DL) exploit single-view imagery, constrained by low-resolution topography, for fast and flexible reconstruction of fine-scale topography. However, their robustness and general applicability across diverse lunar landforms and illumination conditions remain insufficiently explored. In this study, we build upon our previously proposed DL framework by incorporating a more robust scale recovery scheme and extending the model to polar regions under low solar illumination conditions. We demonstrate that, compared with single-view shape-from-shading methods, the proposed DL approach exhibits greater robustness to varying illumination and achieves more consistent and accurate topographic reconstructions. Furthermore, it reliably reconstructs topography across lunar features of diverse scales, morphologies, and geological ages. High-quality topographic models are also produced for the lunar south polar areas, including permanently shadowed regions, demonstrating the method's capability in reconstructing complex and low-illumination terrain. These findings suggest that DL-based approaches have the potential to leverage extensive lunar datasets to support advanced exploration missions and enable investigations of the Moon at unprecedented topographic resolution.
tldr: This paper presents a deep learning approach for high-fidelity lunar topographic reconstruction from single-view imagery, demonstrating robustness across diverse terrain and illumination conditions, including permanently shadowed regions.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的月球高保真地形重建方法，该方法利用单视图图像，在各种地形和光照条件下（包括永久阴影区域）表现出鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 地形模型对于表征行星表面特征和推断潜在的地质过程至关重要。然而，米级地形数据仍然有限，这制约了详细的行星研究，即使是在拥有大量高分辨率轨道图像的月球也不例外。深度学习（DL）的最新进展利用单视图像，并受低分辨率地形的约束，实现了对精细尺度地形的快速和灵活重建。然而，它们在不同月球地貌和光照条件下的鲁棒性和通用适用性仍未得到充分探索。在本研究中，我们建立在我们先前提出的深度学习框架的基础上，通过引入更鲁棒的尺度恢复方案并将模型扩展到低太阳光照条件下的极地区域。我们证明，与单视角阴影恢复形状方法相比，所提出的深度学习方法对不同光照表现出更强的鲁棒性，并实现了更一致和准确的地形重建。此外，它可以可靠地重建不同尺度、形态和地质年龄的月球特征的地形。针对月球南极区域（包括永久阴影区）也生成了高质量的地形模型，证明了该方法在重建复杂和低光照地形方面的能力。这些发现表明，基于深度学习的方法具有利用大量月球数据集来支持高级探测任务并以前所未有的地形分辨率进行月球研究的潜力。

title: Older Adults' Preferences for Feedback Cadence from an Exercise Coach Robot
summary: People can respond to feedback and guidance in different ways, and it is important for robots to personalize their interactions and utilize verbal and nonverbal communication cues. We aim to understand how older adults respond to different cadences of verbal and nonverbal feedback of a robot exercise coach. We conducted an online study of older adults, where participants evaluated videos of the robot giving feedback at different cadences for each modality. The results indicate that changing the cadence of one modality affects the perception of both it and the other modality. We can use the results from this study to better design the frequency of the robot coach's feedback during an exercise session with this population.
tldr: This paper investigates older adults' preferences for verbal and nonverbal feedback cadence from an exercise coach robot, finding that cadence in one modality affects perception of both modalities. The study aims to improve robot coach feedback design for this population.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了老年人对运动教练机器人提供的口头和非口头反馈节奏的偏好，发现一种方式的节奏会影响对两种方式的认知。该研究旨在改进针对老年人群体的机器人教练的反馈设计。
summary_zh: 人们对反馈和指导的反应各不相同，因此机器人个性化交互并利用语言和非语言沟通线索至关重要。我们的目标是了解老年人如何对机器人运动教练提供的不同节奏的语言和非语言反馈作出反应。 我们进行了一项针对老年人的在线研究，参与者评估了机器人在每种模态下以不同节奏给出反馈的视频。 结果表明，改变一种模态的节奏会影响对该模态以及另一种模态的感知。 我们可以利用这项研究的结果，更好地设计机器人在与该人群进行运动期间反馈的频率。
